case_title: ZHENG, JIAN TANG VS MAI, EVELYNE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ZHENG, JIAN TANG AS TO DEFENDANT MAI, EVELYNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAI, EVELYNE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHENG, JIAN TANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAI, EVELYNE $4,213.39 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,328.39, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE IN THE SUM OF $2713.39; AND BODILY INJURY AND GENERAL DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $1500. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY PAYMENTS PREVIOUSLY MADE TO PLAINTIFF FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FILED BY DEFENDANT MAI, EVELYNE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS "DENIED" WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
